# Meadow

## What is Meadow?
Meadow is a personal CRM (customer relationship manager) for friendships.
It works through Telegram. You text Meadow about your life and it
remembers everything: birthdays, jobs, life updates, how you met,
what you talked about. Every Monday, it sends a brief telling you
who to reach out to and drafts the first message for you.

## Who is it for?
Busy adults (parents, professionals) who care about their friends
but struggle to keep track of 50+ relationships.

## How is it different from Monica, Dex, or Clay?
- Conversational: no forms, no menus. Text like you're talking to a friend.
- Lives in Telegram: no new app to install.
- AI-powered briefs: weekly summaries with draft messages.
- Self-hostable: free forever with your own API key and Docker.
- Privacy-first: isolated per-user databases, field-level encryption.

## Pricing
- Fully Hosted: $8/month ($6/month billed yearly)
- Self-Hosted: Free forever (bring your own Anthropic API key)

## Key Features
- Natural language interaction logging
- Smart reminders and birthday alerts
- Relationship circles (inner/close/orbit) with overdue nudges
- Weekly briefs with AI-drafted messages
- Web dashboard with search
- Contact import from Google Contacts CSV
- Field-level encryption, data export (JSON/CSV/vCard)

## Links
- Website: https://zachmeditates.github.io/meadow-site/
- Self-hosting: Docker image available
